Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling isolated or estranged from others.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de aislamiento o distanciamiento de los demás.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到被孤立或與他人疏遠。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Lacking interest, enthusiasm, or concern.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Falta de interés, entusiasmo o preocupación.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 對事物缺乏興趣、熱情或關心。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling guilt, disgrace, or embarrassment.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de culpa, deshonra o bochorno.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到內疚、丟臉或難堪。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling weary and restless through lack of interest.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de cansancio e inquietud por falta de interés.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 因缺乏興趣而感到疲倦和煩躁。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Completely exhausted from overwork or stress.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Estado de fatiga profunda por exceso de trabajo o estrés.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 因過度工作或壓力而完全耗盡精力。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling severe and persistent sadness or despair.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de tristeza o desesperación severa y persistente.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到嚴重且持續的悲傷或絕望。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: The complete loss or absence of hope.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: La pérdida o ausencia total de esperanza.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 完全失去希望或感到毫無希望。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Sad or displeased because expectations were not met.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Tristeza o disgusto por no haberse cumplido las expectativas.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 因期望落空而感到悲傷或不滿。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling detached from reality, oneself, or other people.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de distanciamiento de la realidad, de uno mismo o de otros.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到與現實、自己或他人脫離。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Having lost confidence or enthusiasm.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Pérdida de la confianza o el entusiasmo.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 失去信心或熱情。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Lacking emotional involvement or commitment.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Falta de implicación emocional o de compromiso.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 缺乏情感上的參與或投入。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Having lost determination or confidence.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Pérdida de la determinación o de la confianza.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 失去決心或自信。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling slightly sad or lacking energy.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de ligera tristeza o falta de energía.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到有些悲傷或缺乏活力。

Low-unpleasant.tw_chinese_equivalent: 被排擠 / 被排除在外
Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Left out of a group, activity, or place.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Situación de haber sido dejado fuera de un grupo, actividad o lugar.

Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Pérdida completa de energía física o mental.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 身體或精神能量完全耗盡。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Extremely tired, often resulting from mental or physical exertion.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de gran cansancio, a menudo por esfuerzo mental o físico.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 極度疲倦，通常由腦力或體力過度消耗引起。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Pitifully sad, abandoned, or lonely.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de tristeza lastimosa, abandono o soledad.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到可悲的悲傷、被遺棄或孤獨。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Looking or feeling dejected and gloomy.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Estado de abatimiento y pesadumbre.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 看起來或感到沮喪和陰鬱。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling responsible for a specified wrongdoing.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de responsabilidad por una mala acción específica.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 對特定的錯誤行為感到有責任或自責。

Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Incapacidad para defenderse o actuar sin ayuda.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 無法保護自己或在沒有幫助的情況下行動。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling or causing despair about the future.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Ausencia de expectativa positiva o desesperación por el futuro.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 對未來感到或引起絕望。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Lacking self-confidence or certainty.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Falta de confianza en uno mismo o de certeza.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 缺乏自信或確定性。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Sad because one has no friends or company.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de tristeza por no tener amigos o compañía.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 因為沒有朋友或陪伴而感到悲傷。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Unable to find one's way or lacking a sense of purpose.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Incapacidad de encontrar el camino o falta de un sentido de propósito.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 找不到方向或缺乏目標感。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Unimpressed, apathetic, or lacking enthusiasm.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Estado de apatía, falta de impresión o de entusiasmo.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 覺得普通、冷漠或缺乏熱情。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Wretchedly unhappy or uncomfortable.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Estado de extrema infelicidad o incomodidad.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 極度不開心或感到不舒服。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Deprived of the power of sensation or emotion.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Pérdida temporal de la capacidad de sensación o emoción.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 失去感覺或情緒感受的能力。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Expecting the worst possible outcome.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Tendencia a esperar el peor resultado posible.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 預期會出現最壞的結果。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling or showing sorrow or unhappiness.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de dolor o infelicidad.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到或表現出哀傷與不快樂。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Having no energy or strength left.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Falta total de energía o fuerza restante.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 體力或精力一滴不剩。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: In need of sleep or rest; weary.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Necesidad de sueño o descanso; fatiga.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 需要睡眠或休息；感到疲勞。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Unable to escape from a restrictive situation.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de incapacidad para escapar de una situación restrictiva.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 無法從受限或壓抑的處境中逃脫。

Low-unpleasant.definition_en: Susceptible to physical or emotional attack or harm.
Low-unpleasant.definition_es: Susceptibilidad a ataques o daños físicos o emocionales.
Low-unpleasant.definition_tw: 容易受到身體或情感上的攻擊與傷害。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling or showing strong annoyance or displeasure.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de fuerte molestia o desagrado.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到或表現出強烈的煩躁或不滿。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Slightly angry or irritated.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de irritación o de un ligero enojo.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到有些生氣或被激怒。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Experiencing worry, unease, or nervousness.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de preocupación, inquietud o nerviosismo.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 經歷擔憂、不安或緊張的情緒。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Anxious or fearful that something bad will happen.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Temor o ansiedad de que algo malo suceda.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 對可能發生的壞事感到焦慮或恐懼。

High-unpleasant.definition_es: Inquietud o ansiedad focalizada por algo.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 對某事感到擔心、煩惱或焦慮。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Unable to think clearly or understand.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Incapacidad de pensar con claridad o de entender.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 無法清晰思考或理解。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: The feeling that a person or a thing is beneath consideration.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: El sentimiento de que una persona o cosa no merece consideración.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 認為某人或某事不值得理會或尊重的感覺。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling profound disapproval or revulsion.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de profunda desaprobación o repugnancia.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到強烈的不贊同或反感。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling ashamed or self-conscious.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de vergüenza o turbación frente a otros.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到羞愧或局促不安。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Very angry; furious.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Nivel de ira extrema o furor.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 非常生氣；狂怒狀態。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Desiring what someone else has.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Deseo por lo que otra persona posee.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 渴望別人擁有的東西。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Anxiety that an exciting event is happening elsewhere.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Ansiedad ante la posibilidad de que un evento emocionante ocurra sin uno.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 擔心令人興奮的事件正在其他地方發生而感到的焦慮。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Afraid or anxious.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de miedo o ansiedad repentina.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到恐懼或焦慮。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Annoyed at being unable to change or achieve something.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Molestia provocada por la incapacidad de cambiar o lograr algo.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 因無法改變或實現某事而感到煩惱與氣餒。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Extremely angry.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Nivel de enojo extremadamente alto.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 極度憤怒。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Made to feel ashamed and foolish.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de haber sido menospreciado o hecho sentir en ridículo.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 被迫感到羞愧和愚蠢。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Unusually energetic, restless, or excitable.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Estado inusualmente enérgico, inquieto o excitable.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 異常有活力、焦躁不安或容易激動。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Filled with or showing great emotion.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Demostración de gran emoción o intensidad afectiva.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 充滿或表現出強烈的情感。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Showing or feeling slight anger; annoyed.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Demostración o presencia de ligero enojo y exasperación.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 表現出或感到輕微的生氣；煩躁。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling threatened by a rival or protective of one's rights.

High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到被競爭對手威脅，或過度保護自己的權利。

High-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de nerviosismo físico e incapacidad de relajarse.

High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 容易激動或驚慌。

High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 承擔了太多無法應付的事情而感到壓抑。

High-unpleasant.definition_es: Miedo o ansiedad repentinos e incontrolables.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到突如其來、無法控制的恐懼或焦慮。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Annoyed or irritated.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de molestia o de una irritación leve.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到煩躁或惱火。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Feeling forced or coerced to do something.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de estar siendo forzado o coaccionado a hacer algo.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到被迫或受脅迫去做某事。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Driven back by intense distaste or disgust.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Rechazo provocado por un intenso desagrado o repugnancia.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 因強烈的厭惡或噁心而退縮。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Unable to rest or relax as a result of anxiety or boredom.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Incapacidad de descansar o relajarse debido a la ansiedad o el aburrimiento.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 因焦慮或無聊而無法休息或放鬆。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Fearful or frightened.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de temor, inseguridad o susto.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 害怕或受驚。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Surprised and upset.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Estado de fuerte sorpresa y alteración emocional.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 感到驚訝且不安。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Experiencing mental or emotional strain.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Tensión mental o emocional originada por las circunstancias.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 承受精神或情感上的壓力與緊繃。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Unable to relax because of nervousness or anxiety.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Incapacidad para relajar los músculos o la mente debido al nerviosismo.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 因緊張或焦慮而無法放鬆。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Filled with extreme fear.

High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 充滿極端的恐懼。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Beset by problems, anxiety, or conflict.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Estado de perturbación constante originado por problemas o conflictos.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 受到問題、焦慮或衝突的困擾。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Causing or feeling anxiety; troubled or uncomfortable.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Sensación de malestar, incomodidad o ansiedad latente.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 引起或感到焦慮；煩惱或不舒服。

High-unpleasant.definition_en: Anxious or troubled about actual or potential problems.
High-unpleasant.definition_es: Ansiedad o turbación frente a problemas que son reales o potenciales.
High-unpleasant.definition_tw: 對實際或潛在的問題感到焦慮或煩惱。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Received as adequate, valid, or suitable.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de ser recibido como alguien adecuado, válido o idóneo.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 被認為是足夠、有效或合適的。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Recognized for good qualities or actions.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Reconocimiento que se recibe por las buenas cualidades o acciones.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 因良好的品質或行為而獲得認可與重視。

Low-pleasant.definition_es: Mantenimiento de una armonía o proporción interna adecuada.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 保持或表現出適當的和諧或比例。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Endowed with divine favor, protection, or a special gift.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de poseer protección, profunda suerte o un don especial.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 被賦予神聖的恩典、保護或特殊的禮物。

Low-pleasant.definition_es: Ausencia de nerviosismo, ira o emociones fuertes y alterantes.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 沒有表現出或感到緊張、憤怒或強烈的情緒。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Free from anxiety or responsibility.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Liberación temporal de la ansiedad o las responsabilidades.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 沒有焦慮或責任負擔。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Very relaxed and easygoing.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Estado de alta distensión y falta de complicaciones.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 非常放鬆且隨和。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Providing physical ease and relaxation.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de facilidad y relajación física o mental.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 提供身體或心理上的輕鬆和放鬆。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Feeling or showing sympathy and concern for others.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de simpatía y preocupación activa por los demás.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 對他人感到或表現出同情和關心。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: United, joined, or having a bond with others.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de unión o de tener un vínculo claro con otros.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 與他人團結、結合或有聯繫感。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Giving a feeling of comfort, warmth, and relaxation.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de comodidad envolvente, calidez y relajación.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 給人一種舒適、溫暖和放鬆的感覺。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Showing an ability to understand and share the feelings of another.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Capacidad para comprender y compartir profundamente los sentimientos de otro.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 表現出理解和分享他人感受的能力。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Satisfied or happy as a result of fully developing one's abilities or character.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Satisfacción resultante del desarrollo pleno de las propias capacidades o metas.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 因充分發揮能力或性格而感到滿意或快樂。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Pleasant, fine, or in a satisfactory state.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Estado general agradable, positivo o de condición satisfactoria.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 令人愉快的、好的或處於滿意的狀態。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Feeling or showing an appreciation of kindness.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de profundo aprecio o agradecimiento.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 感受或表達對善意的感激。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Contained as part of a whole or group.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de formar parte activamente de un todo o de un grupo.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 作為整體或群體的一部分被包含在內。

Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de recibir un profundo afecto y cuidado de parte de los demás.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 感受到他人深厚的情感和關心。

Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de relajación suave y fluida.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 令人愉悅的平靜、溫和或放鬆。

Low-pleasant.definition_es: Estado de tranquilidad total y libre de perturbaciones.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 免受干擾；平靜無波。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Giving a sense of happy satisfaction or enjoyment.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de feliz satisfacción o disfrute ante las circunstancias.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 給人帶來快樂的滿足感或享受感。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: No longer feeling distressed or anxious.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de liberación de una angustia, peso o ansiedad previa.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 不再感到苦惱或焦慮。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Deeply admired for abilities, qualities, or achievements.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de ser admirado y validado por las propias capacidades o logros.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 因能力、品質或成就而受到深深的欽佩與重視。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Protected from or not exposed to danger or risk.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de contar con protección y de no estar expuesto a daños o riesgos.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 受到保護或未暴露於危險或風險中。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Contented or pleased with what has been experienced or received.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Estado de contentamiento con lo que se ha experimentado o recibido.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 對所經歷或收到的事物感到滿足或高興。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Certain to remain safe and unthreatened.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento estable de encontrarse a salvo y sin ningún tipo de amenaza.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 確定保持安全且不受威脅。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Calm, peaceful, and untroubled.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Estado de tranquilidad profunda, paz y completa ausencia de problemas.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 平靜、寧靜且無憂無慮。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Given assistance, encouragement, or approval.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de recibir asistencia, ánimo y el respaldo de terceros.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 獲得幫助、鼓勵或認可。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Feeling, showing, or expressing sympathy and understanding.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento o expresión activa de simpatía y apoyo hacia otros.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 感受、表現或表達同情和理解。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Having one's intended meaning correctly perceived.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de que el propio significado o perspectiva ha sido percibido correctamente.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 預期的意圖被正確地感知與體會。

Low-pleasant.definition_en: Considered to be important or beneficial.
Low-pleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de ser considerado importante, útil o de gran beneficio para los demás.
Low-pleasant.definition_tw: 被認為是重要或有益的。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Greatly surprised or astonished.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de enorme sorpresa o admiración.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 感到非常驚訝或驚奇。

High-pleasant.definition_en: A feeling of reverential respect mixed with fear or wonder.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de respeto reverencial mezclado con un fuerte asombro.

High-pleasant.definition_en: Noticeably happy and optimistic.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Estado visible de felicidad, regocijo y optimismo.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 明顯地快樂和樂觀。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Feeling or showing certainty about oneself.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Certeza o seguridad arraigada sobre uno mismo y sus capacidades.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 對自己感到或表現出確定性與信心。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Eager to know or learn something.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Fuerte ansia o deseo por saber y descubrir algo nuevo.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 渴望知道或學習某事。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Feeling or showing great pleasure.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de gran placer y agrado con el momento presente.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 感到或表現出極大的快樂與愉悅。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Having made a firm decision and being resolved not to change it.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Firmeza al haber tomado una decisión con la resolución de no cambiarla.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 做出了堅定的決定並決心不改變它。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Feeling or expressing overwhelming happiness.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento o expresión de felicidad profunda y abrumadora.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 感到或表達壓倒性的快樂。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Ecstatically happy or proud.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación estática de felicidad o de profundo orgullo.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 非常快樂或自豪。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Filled with vitality and enthusiasm.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación de estar lleno de vitalidad y fuerzas para la acción.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 充滿生機與熱情。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Actively involved, busy, or occupied with something.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Participación e involucramiento activo pleno en alguna tarea.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 積極參與、忙碌或專注於某事。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Having or showing intense and eager enjoyment.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Disfrute y exaltación de ánimo frente a alguna actividad o idea.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 具有或表現出強烈且渴望的享受。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Very enthusiastic and eager.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Estado de mucho entusiasmo, ánimo y expectativa por lo venidero.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 非常熱情和渴望。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Very happy, animated, or elated.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de gran animación, alegría desbordante o euforia.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 非常快樂、充滿生氣或興高采烈。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Feeling or showing pleasure or contentment.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación general de placer, bienestar y gran satisfacción.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 感到或表現出愉悅或滿足。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Feeling or inspiring optimism about a future event.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de optimismo y fe en que un evento futuro será positivo.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 對未來事件感到或激發樂觀。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Filled with the urge or ability to do something creative.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento o iluminación del impulso para hacer algo creativo o superarse.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 充滿做創造性事情的衝動或能力。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Feeling, expressing, or causing great pleasure and happiness.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Expresión o sensación de disfrute intenso y felicidad genuina.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 感受、表達或引起極大的愉悅和幸福。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Provided with a strong reason or desire to do something.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Presencia de un fuerte motivo interno o deseo que impulsa a hacer algo.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 被賦予強烈的理由或渴望去做某事。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Hopeful and confident about the future.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Tendencia a observar y esperar lo mejor, con plena confianza sobre el futuro.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 對未來充滿希望和信心。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Showing or caused by strong feelings or beliefs.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Muestra o exaltación de sentimientos o creencias muy fuertes hacia algo.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 表現出或由強烈的情感或信念引起。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Fond of games and amusement; lighthearted.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Actitud alegre e informal, con inclinación a los juegos y la diversión.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 喜歡遊戲和娛樂；輕鬆愉快。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Feeling or showing satisfaction.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación o muestra clara de que algo ha sido muy grato y satisfactorio.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 感到或表現出滿意。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Feeling deep pleasure from one's own achievements.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Sentimiento de profundo placer y satisfacción por los logros o características propias.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 對自己的成就感到深深的喜悅。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Experiencing a sudden feeling of extreme excitement.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Sensación repentina de extrema emoción, atracción o felicidad por algo puntual.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 經歷突然極度興奮的感覺。

High-pleasant.definition_en: Cheerful, optimistic, and positive.
High-pleasant.definition_es: Estado de ánimo alegre, animado, optimista y rotundamente positivo.
High-pleasant.definition_tw: 快樂、樂觀且積極。
